reason: Princess Bride: intricate court intrigues, whispered pacts and double crosses in a whimsical kingdom
Monty Python’s Holy Grail: sly aristocratic scheming meets absurd betrayals in medieval realms
Richard III: poison‐pen politicking and backroom alliances in a noirish royal power play
Queen Margot: Baroque palace intrigues, secret alliances and ruthless betrayals in 16th century France
Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves: court machinations and hidden loyalties pepper this outlaw’s royal gambit
Adventures of Robin Hood: classic castle politics, undercover scouts and scheming barons in medieval England
Robin Hood: Men in Tights: high‐stakes burgling plots and palace betrayals spiced with sly comedy
Brazil: surreal bureaucratic courtships and conspiracies in a dystopian regime’s shadow
Meet Me in St. Louis: undercurrents of society and status shifts behind genteel turn‐of‐century façades
Room with a View: Victorian social maneuvering, unspoken pacts and genteel betrayals in Edwardian drawing rooms
